name: @curationsx/yolo-azure-scripts
description: Operational scripts for the CurationsX Yolo Azure migration (see .azure/deployment-plan.md). Fixture/dry-run use requires no dependencies at all; @azure/cosmos and @azure/identity are only imported (dynamically, at runtime) by reconcile-scores.mjs's real (non-fixture) Cosmos mode -- run `npm ci --prefix scripts/azure` before any real (non --fixture) reconciliation.

scripts.test: npm run test:bash && npm run test:node
